nasb.text: In your seed all the nations of the earth shall be blessed, because you have obeyed My voice.”

esv.text: and in your offspring shall all the nations of the earth be blessed, because you have obeyed my voice.”

cnv.text: 地上萬國都要因你的後裔得福，因為你聽從了我的話。’”

ccb.text: 天下万国必因你的后裔而蒙福，因为你听从了我的话。’”

csbs.text: 地上万国都必因你的后裔而蒙福，因为你听从了我的话。”
